calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jul-13-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on defendants Namane Mohlabane, Michael O'Connor and The Parish at Townhall, Inc.'s Motion to Set Aside the Default entered September 21, 2009, and Default Judgment entered December 30, 2009.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Kristine Knox Esche, Esq. appeared for plaintiff RRW, LLC dba Town Hall, a California limited liability company.
Lizbeth Hasse, Esq. appeared with defendants Namane Mohlabane and Michael O'Connor, and for defendant The Parish at Townhall, Inc., dba The Townhall, a/k/a The Townhall of Oakland, a California corporation.
Defendants Mohlabane and O'Connor were placed under oath and examined.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court GRANTS defendants' motion. The default entered September 21, 2009, and the default judgment entered December 30, 2009, are hereby VACATED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2009 Continued To Jan-22-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
